'''Marsden Latham''' was a dark-skinned member of the of the [[Alderaanian Internal Security Force]] who caught [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] trying to sell [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]]. He carried no weapons.

{{Char-stub}}
